assertions.assertion: Changes return types from IEnumerable<T> to IReadOnlyCollection<T>
assertions.rationale: Response shows the return type change from IEnumerable to IReadOnlyCollection.

assertions.assertion: Shows using .ToList() or .ToArray() to convert query results
assertions.rationale: Response mentions .ToListAsync(), .ToList(), and .ToArray() as conversion methods.

assertions.assertion: Adds CancellationToken parameter to the affected methods
assertions.rationale: Response does not add CancellationToken to method signatures.

assertions.assertion: Mentions this applies to multiple interfaces (IResourceStore, etc.)
assertions.rationale: Response says 'this likely affects multiple methods across IResourceStore and potentially other store interfaces'.
